patch:
diff --git a/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/HDFC.py b/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/HDFC.py
index 97e4fe5..c83a582 100644
--- a/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/HDFC.py
+++ b/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/HDFC.py
@@ -95,9 +95,9 @@ def categorize_HDFC_transactions(transactions, accountType):
         [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bCHR?GS?|^SERVICE CHARGE|\\bCHARGES?\\b|FEE-|[SC]GST|CHQBK_COURIER", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.lt(5000), "CHARGES"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("^[Ff][tT]\\b|FUND TRF", na=False, case=False)  , "FUND_TRANSFER"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("CLOSE OUT W/D", na=False, case=False)  , "BANK_ACCOUNT_CLOSURE"],
-        [transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.type.shift(periods=1).eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.eq(transactions.amount.shift(periods=1)) & transactions.description.eq(transactions.description.shift(periods=2)) & transactions.description.str.contains("IMPS|NEFT|\\bUPI|RTGS", na=False, case=False), "REVERSAL"],
+        [transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.type.shift(periods=1).eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.eq(transactions.amount.shift(periods=1)) & transactions.description.eq(transactions.description.shift(periods=1)) & transactions.description.str.contains("IMPS|NEFT|\\bUPI|RTGS", na=False, case=False), "REVERSAL"],
         [transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.type.shift(periods=1).eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.eq(transactions.amount.shift(periods=1)) & transactions.description.eq(transactions.description.shift(periods=1)), "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE"],
-        [(transactions.remark.str.len().eq(15)) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.remark.str.contains("^[0]{11}[0-9]{5}", na=False, case=False) , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"]
+        [(transactions.remark.str.len().eq(16)) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.remark.str.contains("^[0]{11}[0-9]{5}", na=False, case=False) , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"]
     ]
 
     df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
@@ -121,7 +121,7 @@ def categorize_HDFC_transactions(transactions, accountType):
         [transactions.description.str.contains("HDFCC|BILLPAY DR-HDFCSI-", na=False, case=False) , "CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bRFX.*@|FCY OUTWARD REMITTANCE|HDFC BANK FOREX", na=False, case=False) , "FOREX_TXN"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("^GST/", na=False, case=False) ,"GST"],
-        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("TRANSFER") & transactions.description.str.contains("^[0-9]{6}$", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (accountType=="SAVINGS") , "SALARY"],
+        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("TRANSFER") & transactions.description.str.contains("^[0-9]{6}$", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (accountType=="SAVING") , "SALARY"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("-\\s?SAL ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & (accountType=="CURRENT"), "SALARY_DISBURSED"],
         [transactions.transactionCategory.shift(periods=1).eq("CHEQUE_PAID") & transactions.transactionCategory.eq("CHEQUE_RETURN") & transactions.balanceAfterTransaction.shift(periods=1).lt(0) & (accountType != "OVER_DRAFT") ,"INSUFFICIENTS_FUNDS_BOUNCE"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bSELF\\b|\\bSelf\\b", na=False, case=False), "INTERNAL_PAYMENT"],
diff --git a/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/ICICI.py b/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/ICICI.py
index f13909e..2b2016c 100644
--- a/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/ICICI.py
+++ b/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/ICICI.py
@@ -144,7 +144,7 @@ def categorize_ICICI_transactions(transactions, accountType):
         [transactions.description.str.contains("BILL DESK", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5).replace(to_replace="_.*", value="", regex=True)], #bil onl
         [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("ONLINE_PAYMENT"), sep_by_(transactions.description,1,2)], #ecom pur 
         [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["NEFT_RETURN","RTGS_RETURN"]) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,3,4)], #return
-        [transactions.description.str.contains("^BIL/INFT/", na=False, case=False) & transactions.description.str.count("/").eq(3)  , sep_by_(transactions.description,2,3)],
+        [transactions.description.str.contains("^BIL/INFT/", na=False, case=False) & transactions.description.str.count("/").eq(3)  , sep_by_(transactions.description,3,4)],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("^BIL/BPAY.*BBPS|^BIL/BBPS.*BBPS|^BIL/INFT|^BIL/NEFT", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("^BIL/BPAY|^BIL/RCHG|^BIL/ONL", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,3,4)],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("^BIL/00[12].*/.*/NSP0.*/", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],
@@ -156,7 +156,7 @@ def categorize_ICICI_transactions(transactions, accountType):
         [transactions.description.str.contains("^RTGS/", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,3,4)], #rtgs
         [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["NEFT","RTGS"]) & transactions.description.str.contains("/.*[0]{1,}.*/", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,2,3)],
         [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["NEFT","RTGS"]) & (transactions.description.str.contains("/.*[0]{1,}.*/", na=False, case=False) == False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,1,2)],
-        [transactions.description.str.contains("TRFR TO:|TRFR FROM:", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="TRFR (TO|FROM):(.*)", index=0)],
+        [transactions.description.str.contains("TRFR TO:|TRFR FROM:", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="TRFR (TO|FROM):(.*)", index=1)],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("^TRF/", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,1,2)],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("^CLG/(?!(CHQ|CLG))", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,1,2)],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("iwish", na=False, case=False) , "iWish"],
test_patch:
diff --git a/tests/test_txenrich_boundaries.py b/tests/test_txenrich_boundaries.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1111111
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/test_txenrich_boundaries.py
@@ -0,0 +1,151 @@
+"""Boundary / edge-case correctness for bank-transaction enrichment.
+
+These assert correct labels on exact-length, adjacency, account-type and
+fixed-layout edge inputs that the broader enrichment flow never exercises: a
+cheque-deposit remark whose length sits exactly on the value its digit layout
+implies, a six-digit salary credit in a savings account, an offsetting credit
+that lands directly after its matching debit, a direction-prefixed transfer
+whose payee name follows the direction keyword, and a structured bill payee
+that sits in the final segment of its layout. Ordinary transactions feed values
+comfortably away from these edges, so a boundary regression here stays invisible
+to them.
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+
+import pandas as pd
+
+from categorizationapp.BankScripts.HDFC import categorize_HDFC_transactions
+from categorizationapp.BankScripts.ICICI import categorize_ICICI_transactions
+
+
+def _row(**over):
+    row = {
+        "description": "NEUTRALNARR",
+        "type": "CREDIT",
+        "amount": 5000.0,
+        "balanceAfterTransaction": 10000.0,
+        "remark": "",
+    }
+    row.update(over)
+    return row
+
+
+def _hdfc(rows, account_type="SAVING"):
+    return categorize_HDFC_transactions(pd.DataFrame(rows).copy(), account_type)
+
+
+def _icici(rows, account_type="SAVING"):
+    return categorize_ICICI_transactions(pd.DataFrame(rows).copy(), account_type)
+
+
+# --- fail_to_pass: one per planted defect (mutually disjoint) -------------
+
+class TestChequeDepositRemarkLength(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_sixteen_char_zero_prefixed_remark_is_cheque_deposit(self):
+        out = _hdfc([_row(description="RANDOMTXNNARR", type="CREDIT",
+                          remark="0000000000012345")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT")
+
+
+class TestSixDigitSavingsSalary(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_six_digit_credit_in_savings_is_salary(self):
+        out = _hdfc([_row(description="123456", amount=45000.0, type="CREDIT")],
+                    account_type="SAVING")
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionSubcategory"].iloc[0], "SALARY")
+
+
+class TestAdjacentReversal(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_credit_mirroring_prior_debit_is_reversal(self):
+        out = _hdfc([
+            _row(description="NEFT PAYMENT ABC", amount=777.0, type="DEBIT"),
+            _row(description="NEFT PAYMENT ABC", amount=777.0, type="CREDIT"),
+        ])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[1], "REVERSAL")
+
+
+class TestTrfPayeeDirectionPrefix(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_transfer_payee_follows_direction_keyword(self):
+        out = _icici([_row(description="TRFR TO: JOHN DOE", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "John Doe")
+
+
+class TestBilInftPayeeSegment(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_payee_is_final_segment(self):
+        out = _icici([_row(description="BIL/INFT/000123/JOHN DOE", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "John Doe")
+
+
+# --- pass_to_pass: pin adjacent correct behavior (green at both states) ----
+
+class TestChequeDepositRemarkPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_fifteen_char_remark_is_not_cheque_deposit(self):
+        out = _hdfc([_row(description="RANDOMTXNNARR", type="CREDIT",
+                          remark="000000000001234")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "TRANSFER")
+
+    def test_sixteen_char_non_zero_remark_is_not_cheque_deposit(self):
+        out = _hdfc([_row(description="RANDOMTXNNARR", type="CREDIT",
+                          remark="1234567890123456")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "TRANSFER")
+
+
+class TestSalaryPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_six_digit_credit_in_current_is_not_salary(self):
+        out = _hdfc([_row(description="123456", amount=45000.0, type="CREDIT")],
+                    account_type="CURRENT")
+        self.assertNotEqual(out["transactionSubcategory"].iloc[0], "SALARY")
+
+    def test_a2aint_credit_still_salary(self):
+        out = _hdfc([_row(description="A2AINT01-EMPLOYER", type="CREDIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionSubcategory"].iloc[0], "SALARY")
+
+
+class TestReversalPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_lone_credit_without_prior_debit_is_not_reversal(self):
+        out = _hdfc([_row(description="NEFT PAYMENT ABC", amount=777.0, type="CREDIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "TRANSFER")
+
+    def test_mismatched_amount_is_not_reversal(self):
+        out = _hdfc([
+            _row(description="NEFT PAYMENT ABC", amount=500.0, type="DEBIT"),
+            _row(description="NEFT PAYMENT ABC", amount=777.0, type="CREDIT"),
+        ])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[1], "TRANSFER")
+
+
+class TestTrfPayeePins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_trfr_transaction_category_still_transfer(self):
+        out = _icici([_row(description="TRFR TO: JOHN DOE", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "TRANSFER")
+
+    def test_adjacent_slash_transfer_payee_extraction_intact(self):
+        out = _icici([_row(description="TRF/RAVI KUMAR", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "Ravi Kumar")
+
+
+class TestPayeePins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_upi_payee_extraction_unaffected(self):
+        # UPI payees come off a different slice (untouched by the fix): the name
+        # is the final segment of a four-part UPI description.
+        out = _icici([_row(description="UPI/000111/SOMEREF/JANE SMITH", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "Jane Smith")
+
+    def test_bil_inft_with_extra_segment_uses_other_branch(self):
+        out = _icici([_row(description="BIL/INFT/000123/JOHN DOE/EXTRA", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertNotEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "000123")
+
+
+class TestGeneralCategoryPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_icici_cash_withdrawal_category(self):
+        out = _icici([_row(description="CASH WDL ATM", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "ATM_WITHDRAWAL")
+
+    def test_hdfc_pos_card_payment_category(self):
+        out = _hdfc([_row(description="POS 1234XX5678 SOMESHOP", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "CARD_PAYMENT")
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
